历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12532 → 24672 → 16951 → 14048 → 13739. In 2022, the ranking was abnormally high due to the inclusion of the Fujian-Taiwan Cooperation B segment. From 2023 to 2025, it returned to the 14000–17000 range and showed a slight upward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13739. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi was 35 in 2021, 45 in 2022, and 41 from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 plan is 38, a decrease of 3 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 7.3%), which slightly intensifies competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a Project 211 and national Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 77th in 2025 and 77th in 2026, indicating stable performance and a position in the upper-middle tier nationally. During the 2024 reputation cycle, there was a campus safety incident (negative evaluation), but in the 2025–2026 reputation documents, the university no longer appeared, indicating no major public opinion shocks recently. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, with a rating of 'average,' and short video exposure is at a medium level, showing no significant signs of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering have strong engineering capabilities, directly corresponding to majors such as Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering, and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. At Fuzhou University, majors like Computer Science, Automation, and Microelectronics Science and Engineering benefit from industry popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025. This slight decline in the total number of examinees somewhat eases competition. Fuzhou University is located in Fuzhou City, Fujian Province, in the southeastern coastal region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi for Physics Category is about 38–41, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13739, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7.3%, the decrease in Shanxi Physics Category examinees by about 3.4%, and the stable university reputation, the reduction effect slightly outweighs the examinee decrease effect. However, the stable university level and strong support from popular majors suggest that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will fluctuate slightly around 13136. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13106, with a range of 12606–13606.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12606–13606, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mathematics, Safety Engineering, Intelligent Construction), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Automation) as reach options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 12606), focus on Tier 1 popular majors. For rankings near the upper bound (around 13606), use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Among these, Chemistry, although part of the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials category, is an A- advantage discipline at Fuzhou University, offering relatively high cost-effectiveness. The Fujian-Taiwan Cooperation projects (Electronic Information Engineering, Biological Engineering, Logistics Management) have a wide ranking range and can serve as additional alternatives.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1920 → 2343 → 2488 → 2657 → 2709, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 789 places over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2709. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Shanxi Province remained stable at 4 students from 2021 to 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan document does not include history category data, so the plan change cannot be calculated and is considered unchanged according to the rules.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking is stable at 77th, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. During the 2024 reputation cycle, there was a campus safety incident (negative evaluation), but in the 2025–2026 reputation documents, the university no longer appears, and there is no recent major public opinion impact. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', indicating moderate application attention. Fuzhou University is known for science and engineering, with few liberal arts majors. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no A-level liberal arts disciplines. 专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 789 places over the past 5 years), the significant reduction of about 25.6% in history category examinees in Shanxi Province in 2026 (competition notably alleviated), the unchanged enrollment plan, and the university's average liberal arts strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward from 2709. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2649, with a range of 2172–3126.
